entity.atmospheric.tetra.description: An aquatic ambient passive mob found in Rainforest biomes. They swim deeper to avoid the surface. Fits in a bucket.
entity.atmospheric.cochineal.description: A passive arthropod native to Scrubland biomes. Can be bred with Dragon Fruit, but both parents will die upon giving birth. Golden Dragon Fruits will increase the amount of babies. Killing will drop Carmine Husks
item.atmospheric.yellow_blossoms.descrip: A flower picked from fully grown Aloe plants and Flowering Morado Leaves. Can be crafted into Yellow Dye.
item.atmospheric.passion_vine_coil.descr: Can be thrown on the side of a block to place up to 8 Passion Vines.
item.atmospheric.tetra_bucket.descriptio: A bucket with a Tetra inside.
item.atmospheric.carmine_husk.descriptio: Dropped from a Cochineal. Can be used for building blocks, banner patterns, or armor trim material.
item.atmospheric.dragon_fruit.descriptio: A fruit found in Scrublands. Can be eaten, crafted into Pink Dye, or crafted into a Golden Dragon Fruit.
item.atmospheric.golden_dragon_fruit.des: A guilded fruit that grants you resistance to fire.
item.atmospheric.passion_fruit_sorbet.de: Gives outstanding saturation, but inflicts Slowness.
item.atmospheric.orange_sorbet.descripti: Gives outstanding saturation, but inflicts Slowness.
item.atmospheric.currant_muffin.descript: A muffin that restores a small amout of saturation and hunger.
item.atmospheric.passion_fruit_tart.desc: A tart that restores a small amout of saturation and hunger.
item.atmospheric.candied_orange_slices.d: A sweetened fruit that restores saturation.
item.atmospheric.orange_pudding.descript: A pudding that restores decent saturation.
item.atmospheric.passion_vine_bundle.des: A block made of Passion Vine. Used to compact or as a decoration.
item.atmospheric.passion_fruit.descripti: A fruit found in rainforests and can be eaten.
item.atmospheric.yucca_fruit.description: An rare fruit hanging off of Yucca Trees. Can be eaten or roasted.
item.atmospheric.roasted_yucca_fruit.des: Can be eaten to grant persistence, which allows you to run fast at low hunger.
item.atmospheric.shimmering_passion_frui: A guilded fruit that grants the ability to shoot seeds when eaten.
item.atmospheric.currant.description: A fruit found in Kousa Jungle. Hangs from a Currant Tree. Can be eaten and crafted into Purple Dye.
item.atmospheric.aloe_leaves.description: A succulent found in the Dunes. Can be eaten or brewed into a anti-withering potion.
item.atmospheric.aloe_gel_bottle.descrip: An item that can be crafted into Aloe Gel Blocks, or eaten.
lore.atmospheric.yucca_gateau: A refined Cake. Place into the world and eat it up to 10 times. Gives you persistence when eaten.
lore.atmospheric.blood_orange: A fruit grown from Laurel Trees in the Nether. Act the same as Oranges.
lore.atmospheric.aloe_gel_block: A block that slows entities walking through it, but inflicts Poison.
lore.atmospheric.aloe_bundle: A block made of Aloe. Used to compact or as a decoration.
lore.atmospheric.arid_glass: A block that may make for a nice window.
lore.atmospheric.orange: A fruit found in the Laurel Forest. Can be eaten or placed. If placed and broken by jumping on or a piston, they create a vapor cloud. This allows the use of Riptide. Oranges near a Laurel sapling will more likely produce orange bearing trees.
lore.atmospheric.yucca_bundle: A block grown from Yucca Trees.
lore.atmospheric.grimweb: A block thats slows entities that walk through it.
lore.atmospheric.suspicious_arid_sand: A block that resembles Arid Sand, but can be brushed to reveal a hidden item.
lore.atmospheric.suspicious_red_arid_san: A block that resembles Red Arid Sand, but can be brushed to reveal a hidden item.
lore.atmospheric.agave: A flower that can be placed in a Flower Pot or smelted into Cyan Dye.
lore.atmospheric.warm_monkey_brush: A flower that can be crafted into Yellow Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.hot_monkey_brush: A flower that can be crafted into Orange Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.scalding_monkey_brush: A flower that can be crafted into Red Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.yucca_flower: A flower that can be crafted into Light Gray Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.gilia: A flower that can be crafted into Magenta Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.firethorn: A flower that can be crafted into Red Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.forsythia: A flower that can be crafted into Yellow Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.atmospheric.barrel_cactus: A prickly block that can be crafted into Orange Dye or placed in a Flower Pot. Inflicts Worsening.
lore.atmospheric.passion_vine: A climbable wall plant that grows downwards. Grows Passion Fruits.
lore.atmospheric.yucca_branch: Holds Yucca Bundles. Can be bonemealed to produce more Yucca Bundles.
lore.atmospheric.water_hyacinth: A plant that floats on water. Can be crafted into Purple Dye or placed in a Flower.
lore.atmospheric.tall_yucca_flower: A tall flower that grows on Yucca Trees. Can be grown with Bone Meal or crafted into Light Gray Dye.
lore.atmospheric.aloe_kernels: Can be grown on any Sand to grow more Aloe.
lore.atmospheric.golden_growths: Foliage found in the Aspen Parkland.
lore.atmospheric.arid_sprouts: A common sprout found in Arid Biomes.
lore.atmospheric.carmine_block: A block made from Carmine Husk
lore.atmospheric.chiseled_carmine_shingl: A Carmine Shingles block with a chiseled pattern.
